name: Phage
description: Fires seven beams of continuous biochemical energy which depletes the life of any surface they contact.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fires seven beams of continuous biochemical energy which depletes the life of any surface they contact.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would occur while using certain types of guns (eg. Phage).

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Phage Status Chance showing incorrectly in the Arsenal/Market UI.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed controller rumble persisting after you have stopped firing the Phage.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Phage reload sound playing constantly if the Hectagon Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash related to shooting the Phage inside Limbo's Cataclysm.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s clones having an incorrect fire spread when using the Phage as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/536814-mirage-hom-phage-resets-when-switching-between-clones/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a typo in Phage’s Codex description.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: resulting in a list of changes similar from weapon to weapon.  The following list of changes apply to all Primary Shotguns with exception to the Phage:

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the reload sound of Phage never ending if the animation is interrupted with a Tenno power.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Phage sound firing indefinitely when player is killed / revived.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Altered the visuals on the Infested Phage beam.
